goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should 'arrive by 12:45'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to birmingham new street and should arrive by 12:45
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on monday
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
